role_summary: Senior AI Engineer at Redrob AI, Series A startup. Own the intelligence layer — ranking, retrieval, matching systems. 5-9 years experience. Product-company experience required.
must_have_skills: embeddings-based retrieval systems (sentence-transformers, BGE, E5, OpenAI)
vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, FAISS, Elasticsearch)
evaluation frameworks for ranking (NDCG, MRR, MAP, A/B testing)
disqualifiers: pure research background without production deployment
only API-wrapper LLM experience under 12 months
not written production code in 18 months
only consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini)
primary expertise in CV, speech, robotics without NLP/IR
closed-source only work for 5+ years with no external validation
company_type_preference: product companies, AI startups (not pure services)
behavioral_signals_weight: high — inactive candidates, low response rate, long notice should be down-weighted
embedding_text: Senior AI Engineer founding team embedding retrieval ranking search vector database sentence-transformers BGE E5 FAISS Pinecone Qdrant Milvus Elasticsearch hybrid search BM25 reranking LLM fine-tuning LoRA evaluation NDCG MRR A/B testing production deployment product company Python NLP information retrieval recommendation system
